title: Polbbo's Trailer-Like Vanilla
description: A vanilla experience featuring the visuals of the Minecraft Trailers, right at one click. Currently in 1.21 Beta!
body:
# Polbbo's Trailer-Like Vanilla (1.21)
> This modpack is still in **Beta phase** and is currently getting tested in the hopes of a full release.

A simple, lightweight vanilla modpack that brings the visuals of the Minecraft promotional trailers to the game.

![Polbbo's Trailer-Like Vanilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bfe2f71f43f24840cd2671ac1f06db326235f3e.png)
> Screenshot taken in-game!

Originally a port/rework from [Lowresbones](https://www.youtube.com/c/lowresbones)' [Low Res Trailer Recreation](https://modrinth.com/modpack/low-res-trailer-recreation), this modpack aims to bring a couple of gameplay and visual features to enhance the experience.

## Mod Features
**[Amplified Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/amplified-nether):** Remember those high nether steeps and mountains from the promotional 1.16 trailer? Well, here they are!

**[Ambient Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds)** and **[Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps):** Will serve to add immersion in the form of sounds, echoes, steps and background ambience.

**[Music Delay Remover](https://modrinth.com/mod/infinite-music)** and **[Now Playing](https://modrinth.com/mod/now-playing):** The combination of these 2 mods brings an extra bit of immersion by looping Minecraft's OST and leaving no awkward gaps inbetween. It adds extra ambience, as now biome-dependant OST will be able to be noticed more often! They'll also display the names of the songs you're listening to! (You can disable this in the Key Binds configuration).

**[Shoulder Surfing Reloaded](https://modrinth.com/mod/shoulder-surfing-reloaded):** Adds a hotkey to toggle a better third person that gives you the ability to rotate your camera 360 degrees and move your character in a really intuitive way. (The key to toggle this can be changed in the Key Binds configuration.)

**[Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify):** Brings back an overhauled version of the Optifine zoom key which uses the scroll wheel to amplify on the direction you're zooming!

## Texture/Resource Features
**[Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones):** Adds the classical, simplistic look of the textures in the Minecraft promotional trailers and art.

**[Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations):** Brings all the mobs in Minecraft to live with new animations that will replace the stiff movements and give the mobs expressions and fluidity.

**[Expressive Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player)** and **[Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations):** Adds the same animations from Fresh Animations to the player! By going in third person with Shoulder Surfing Reloaded, your character will be able to move and express themselves in a more lively way!

## Shader Features
**[BSL Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders):** Featuring a slightly tweaked version of Low Res Trailer Recreation shader configuration to solidify this experience.

![Polbbo's Trailer-Like Vanilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/858a2e91915cc055324cfc3a23bca7792790d0d2.png)

> This modpack has been brought to you by [Polbbo_](https://modrinth.com/user/Polbbo_05). Huge credit to Lowresbones!
